title: Brush Twice Daily
shortDescription: Brush your teeth two times a day.
detail: Brushing twice a day helps remove plaque and prevents cavities. Use fluoride toothpaste and brush for at least two minutes.

title: Floss Every Day
detail: Daily flossing cleans areas your toothbrush cannot reach and helps prevent gum disease.

title: Limit Sugary Foods
detail: Sugary foods increase acid production in the mouth, leading to enamel damage and cavities.

title: Drink Plenty of Water
detail: Drinking water helps wash away food particles and keeps saliva levels balanced.

title: Replace Toothbrush Regularly
detail: Old toothbrushes are less effective at cleaning teeth and can harbor bacteria.

title: Visit Dentist Regularly
detail: Regular dental visits help detect issues early and maintain oral health.

title: Avoid Smoking
detail: Smoking causes gum disease, bad breath, and increases the risk of oral cancer.

title: Use Mouthwash
detail: Mouthwash reduces bacteria, freshens breath, and strengthens enamel.
